folio.label: 204v
folio.l: Now is it wan , and of a leden hewe
Who so it vsetú , sore shal he rewe
And of my swynk , ©et blered is myn eye
Lo whicú a vauntage is , to multiplie
That slydyng science , hatú me mad so bare
That I haue no good , where so euäe I fare
And ©et I am endetted so , ther by
Of gold , that I haue borwed , trewely
That whil I lyue , I shal it quyte neuere
Lat euäy man , be war by me , for euere
What manä man , æ castetú hi~ ther to
If he continue , I holde his thrift I do
For so helpe me god , æä by shal he nat wynne
But empte his purs , & make his wittes thy~ne
And whan he thurgú his madnesse , & folye
Hatú loost his owne good , thurgú Iupartie
Tha~ne he excitetú , othere folk ther to
To lese here good , as he hi~ self hatú do
For vn to shrewes , ioye it is and ese
To haue here felawes , in peyne & dissese
Thus was I ones lerned , of a Clerk
Of that , no charge , I wil speke of oure werk
¢ Whan we ben there , as we schuln exersise

note.notetxt: 31Indication in left margin for a paragraph mark to be included. The paraph has not been executed.MP

folio.l: Oure eluyssú craft , we semen wonder wyse
Oure t ämes ben so clergeal , and queynte
I blowe the fyr , til that myn hert feynte
What schulde I telle , eche ¸porciou~
Of thynges , whicú that we , werche vp on
As on fyue , or sexe vnces , may wel be
Of siluer , or sum other quantitee
And bisie me , to telle ©ow the names
Of Orpement , brent bones , Iren squames
That in to poudre , grounden be ful smal
And in an erthene pot , how put is al
And salt I put In , and also papere
Biforn~ theise poudres , æ I speke of heere
And wel I couäed , w a laumpe of glas
And meche other thyng , whicú æ æäe was
As of the pot , and glasses enlutynge
That of the eyr , mygút passe out no thynge
And of the esy fyr , and smert also
Whicú æ was made , & of the care and woo
That we hadde , in oure maters sublymyngö
